                      static void s_InlineModeCheck( void )
                      {
                          U16 u16t_InlineModeDeactSpeed;
                          U16 u16t_INoOfAntiPinchToSwitchToProfile2;
   287 9 0     (T)    s_InlineModeCheck
   291 9 1      *       u16t_InlineModeDeactSpeed = u16g_SysEepromCtrl_InlineModeDeactSpeed;
   292 9 2      *       u16t_INoOfAntiPinchToSwitchToProfile2 = u16g_SysEepromCtrl_NoOfAntiPinchToSwitchToProfile2;
   294 9 3     (T)(F)   if( u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineMod_F != ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          {
   296 9 4     (T)(F)     if( ( u16g_ApiIn_LinRx_VehicleSpeed > u16t_InlineModeDeactSpeed )
                              &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_LinRx_VehicleSpeed != ( ( U16 )( 0x01FFU ) ) ) )
                              {
   299 9 5      *           g_InlineModeEEPROMClear( );
                              }
                          }
   303 9 6     (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineMod_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          &&  ( u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineModSpdChange_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) )
                          {

                              {
   308 9 8      *           g_InlineModeSpeedChangeFlagEEPROMSet( );
                              }
                          }
   312 9 9      *       return;
                      }

                      U8 u8s_RAM_Test( void )
                      {	
                          U8 u8t_Result;

   371 12 1     *       U8 u8t_RAM_Test_Value = ( ( U8 )( 0x5AU ) );    
   373 12 2    (T)( )   if( u8t_RAM_Test_Value == ( ( U8 )( 0x5AU ) ) )
                          {
   375 12 3     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   379 12 4               u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
   382 12 5     *       return( u8t_Result );
                      }
                      U8 u8s_ROM_Test_Enable( void )
                      {	
                          U8 u8t_Result;
   392 13 0    (T)    u8s_ROM_Test_Enable
   395 13 1     *       REG_FERCNFG . Byte |= 0x01U;    
   397 13 2    (T)(F)   if( REG_FERCNFG . Byte == 0x01U )
                          {
   399 13 3     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   403 13 4     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
                          }
   406 13 5     *       return( u8t_Result );
                      }
                      U8 u8s_Register_Test( void )
                      {	
                          U8 u8t_Register_InitialValue;
                          U8 u8t_Register_WriteValue;
                          U8 u8t_Result;
   416 14 0    (T)    u8s_Register_Test
   420 14 1     *       U8 u8t_LoopCnt = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          do
                          {
   424 14 2     *         REG_ECCIE . Byte &= ~( ( U8 )( 0xFFU ) ); 
   425 14 3     *         u8t_Register_InitialValue = REG_ECCIE . Byte;
   427 14 4     *         REG_ECCIE . Byte |= ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   428 14 5     *         u8t_Register_WriteValue = REG_ECCIE . Byte;
   430 14 6     *         u8t_LoopCnt++;
   431 14 7    (T)( )     if( ( u8t_Register_InitialValue == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                              &&  ( u8t_Register_WriteValue == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) ) )
                              {
   434 14 8     *           u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   435 14 9     *           u8t_LoopCnt = 3U;
                              }
                              else
                              {
   439 14 10                u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) );
                              }
                          }
   442 14 11   ( )(F)     while( u8t_LoopCnt < 3U );
   444 14 12    *       return( u8t_Result );    
                      }
                      U8 u8s_EEPROM_Test( void )
                      {	
                          U8 u8t_EEPROM_WriteValue;
                          U8 u8t_EEPROM_ReadValue;
                          U8 u8t_Result;
   454 15 0    (T)    u8s_EEPROM_Test
   458 15 1     *       U8 u8t_LoopCnt = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
   460 15 2     *       u8t_EEPROM_ReadValue = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 7U ) ) );
   461 15 3     *       u8t_EEPROM_WriteValue = ( ( U8 )( 0x5BU ) );
   463 15 4    (T)(F)   if( u8t_EEPROM_WriteValue == u8t_EEPROM_ReadValue )
                          {
   465 15 5     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
                              do
                              {
   471 15 6     *           g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 7U ) ), u8t_EEPROM_WriteValue );
   472 15 7     *           u8t_EEPROM_ReadValue = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 7U ) ) );
   473 15 8     *           u8t_LoopCnt++;
   474 15 9    (T)(F)       if( u8t_EEPROM_WriteValue == u8t_EEPROM_ReadValue )
                                  {
   476 15 10    *             u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   477 15 11    *             u8t_LoopCnt = 3U;
                                  }
                                  else
                                  {
   481 15 12    *             u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x08U ) );
                                  }
                              }
   484 15 13   (T)(F)         while( u8t_LoopCnt < 3U );
                          }
   487 15 14    *       return( u8t_Result );
                      }

                      void ADC0_stop_current_workaround( void )
                      {
   163 4 0     ( )    ADC0_stop_current_workaround
   164 4 1              U8 tmp_ADCxCTL_0 = REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte;		
   165 4 2              U8 tmp_ADCxTIM = REG_ADC0TIM . Byte;
   166 4 3              U8 tmp_ADCxSTS = REG_ADC0STS . Byte;
   168 4 4              REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte = 0x00;                   
   169 4 5              REG_ADC0TIM . Byte = 0x00;                     
   173 4 6              REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte = 0x88;                   
   174 4 7              REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte = 0x88;                   
   175 4 8              REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte = 0x20;                  
   177 4 9     ( )( )   while( REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Bits . RSTA == ( ( U8 )( 0x1U ) ) ) {}      
   178 4 10             REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte = 0x40;                  
   179 4 11             REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte = 0x40;                  
   180 4 12    ( )( )   while( REG_ADC0EIF . Bits . TRIG_EIF == ( ( U8 )( 0x0U ) ) ) {}   
   181 4 13             REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Bits . ADC_SR =1;                
   182 4 14    ( )( )   while( REG_ADC0STS . Bits . READY == ( ( U8 )( 0x0U ) ) ) {}      
   183 4 15             REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte = 0x00;                   
   184 4 16             REG_ADC0TIM . Byte = tmp_ADCxTIM;              
   185 4 17             REG_ADC0STS . Byte = tmp_ADCxSTS;
   186 4 18             REG_ADC0CTL . Overlap_STR . ADC0CTL_0STR . Byte = tmp_ADCxCTL_0;          
   188 4 19             return;
                      }

                          U8 u8t_Index;
                          U8 u8t_FrameCnt;
   168 1 0     (T)    g_SysEepromCtrl_Main
   172 1 1     (T)(F)   if( u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd != u8g_SysEepromCtrl_WdbiCmd_Old )
                          {      
   174 1 2      *         switch( u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd )
                              {            
   176 1 3     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA2U ) ):
   177 1 4      *             s_Write2Eeprom_ProdDate( );
   178 1 5      *             break;
   179 1 6     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA3U ) ):
   180 1 7      *             s_Write2Eeprom_PartNo( );
   181 1 8      *             break;
   182 1 9     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA5U ) ):
   183 1 10     *             s_Write2Eeprom_HW_Version( );
   184 1 11     *             break;
   185 1 12    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA6U ) ):
   186 1 13     *             s_Write2Eeprom_DB_Version( );
   187 1 14     *             break;
   188 1 15    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0x12U ) ):
   189 1 16     *             s_Write2Eeprom_UserOptionRecord( );
   190 1 17     *             break;
   191 1 18    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xB2U ) ):
   192 1 19     *             s_Write2Eeprom_Write1Byte( );
   193 1 20     *             break;
   194 1 21    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ):
   195 1 22     *             s_Write2Eeprom_ReprogramExcute( );
   196 1 23     *             break;            
   197 1 24    (T)          default: 
   197 1 25     *             u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
   198 1 26     *             break;
                              }
   201 1 27     *         u8g_SysEepromCtrl_WdbiCmd_Old = u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd;
   202 1 28     *         u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
   205 1 29     *       return;
                      }
                      void g_SysEepromCtrl_Diag( void )
                      {
   215 2 0     (T)    g_SysEepromCtrl_Diag
   216 2 1     (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorCtrl_EepWriteCmd != u8g_SysEepromCtrl_EepWriteCmd_Old )
                          {      
   218 2 2      *         switch( u8g_DoorCtrl_EepWriteCmd )
                              {            
   220 2 3     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 1U ) ):
   221 2 4      *             s_DiagEepromWrite( ( ( U8 )( 1U ) ) );
   222 2 5      *             break;
   223 2 6     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 2U ) ):
   224 2 7      *             s_DiagEepromWrite( ( ( U8 )( 2U ) ) );
   225 2 8      *             break;
   226 2 9     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 3U ) ):
   227 2 10     *             s_DiagEepromWrite( ( ( U8 )( 3U ) ) );
   228 2 11     *             break;
   229 2 12    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 4U ) ):
   230 2 13     *             s_OverPosWrite( );
   231 2 14     *             break;
   232 2 15    (T)          default: 
   232 2 16     *             u8g_DoorCtrl_EepWriteCmd = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
   233 2 17     *             break;
                              }
   236 2 18     *         u8g_SysEepromCtrl_EepWriteCmd_Old = u8g_DoorCtrl_EepWriteCmd;
   237 2 19     *         u8g_DoorCtrl_EepWriteCmd = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
   240 2 20     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_Write2Eeprom_ProdDate( void )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Index;
   250 3 0     (T)    s_Write2Eeprom_ProdDate
   253 3 1     (T)(F)   for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_Index++ )
                          {
   255 3 2      *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 10U ) ) + u8t_Index, u8g_SysUds_WriteData[u8t_Index] );
                          }
   258 3 3      *       return;
                      }

   271 4 1     (T)(F)   for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < ( ( U8 )( 0x0AU ) ); u8t_Index++ )
                          {
   273 4 2      *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 30U ) ) + u8t_Index, u8g_SysUds_WriteData[u8t_Index] );
                          }
   276 4 3      *       return;
                      }

   289 5 1     (T)(F)   for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_Index++ )
                          {
   291 5 2      *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 14U ) ) + u8t_Index, u8g_SysUds_WriteData[u8t_Index] );
                          }
   294 5 3      *       return;
                      }
                      void s_Write2Eeprom_DB_Version( void )

   307 6 1     (T)(F)   for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_Index++ )
                          {
   309 6 2      *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 18U ) ) + u8t_Index, u8g_SysUds_WriteData[u8t_Index] );
                          }
   312 6 3      *       return;
                      }
                      void s_Write2Eeprom_UserOptionRecord( void )

   325 7 1      *       u8t_WriteData = u8g_SysUds_WriteData[0];
   327 7 2      *       g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 4U ) ), u8t_WriteData );
   329 7 3      *       return;
                      }
                      void s_Write2Eeprom_Write1Byte( void )
                      {
                          U16 u16t_AddrMsb;
                          U8 u8t_AddrLsb;
                          U8 u8t_WriteData;
   339 8 0     (T)    s_Write2Eeprom_Write1Byte
   344 8 1      *       u16t_AddrMsb = (U16)( u8g_SysUds_WriteData[0] * 256U );
   345 8 2      *       u8t_AddrLsb = u8g_SysUds_WriteData[1];
   346 8 3      *       u8t_WriteData = u8g_SysUds_WriteData[2];
   348 8 4      *       g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( u16t_AddrMsb, u8t_AddrLsb, u8t_WriteData );
   350 8 5      *       return;
                      }
                      void s_Write2Eeprom_ReprogramExcute( void )
                      {    
                          U8 u8t_Temp;
   360 9 0     (T)    s_Write2Eeprom_ReprogramExcute
                          do
                          {
   365 9 1      *         u8t_Temp = EEPROM_SetByte( ( EEPROM_TAddress )0x001003F0, 0xB5 );  
                          }
   367 9 2     (T)(F)     while( u8t_Temp != 0U );
   369 9 3      *       u8g_SystemReset_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   371 9 4      *       return;
                      }
                      void s_EepromSysInfoDataRead( void )
                      {
   381 10 0    (T)    s_EepromSysInfoDataRead
   382 10 1     *       s_EepromProdDateRead( );
   383 10 2     *       s_EepromPartNoRead( );
   384 10 3     *       s_EepromHeVerRead( );
   385 10 4     *       s_EepromDbVerRead( );
   386 10 5     *       s_EepromSleepModeRead( );
   387 10 6     *       s_EepromMotorA1A2OutputRead( );
   389 10 7     *       return;
                      }

   402 11 1    (T)(F)   for( u8t_Idx = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Idx < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_Idx++ )
                          { 
   404 11 2     *         u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ProdDateInfo[ u8t_Idx ] = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 10U ) ) + u8t_Idx );

   407 11 3     *       return;
                      }

                          { 
   422 12 2     *         u8g_SysEepromCtrl_PartNoInfo[ u8t_Idx ] = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 30U ) ) + u8t_Idx );

                          {

                          }
   443 13 3     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_EepromDbVerRead( void )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Idx;
   453 14 0    (T)    s_EepromDbVerRead
   456 14 1    (T)(F)   for( u8t_Idx = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Idx < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_Idx++ )
                          { 
   458 14 2     *         u8g_SysEepromCtrl_DbVerInfo[ u8t_Idx ]= u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 300U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 18U ) ) + u8t_Idx );
                          }
   461 14 3     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_EepromSleepModeRead( void )
                      {
   471 15 0    (T)    s_EepromSleepModeRead
   472 15 1     *       u8g_SysEepromCtrl_SleepMode = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 8U ) ) );
   474 15 2     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_EepromMotorA1A2OutputRead( void )
                      {
   485 16 0    (T)    s_EepromMotorA1A2OutputRead
   486 16 1     *       u8g_SysEepromCtrl_MotorA1A2Output = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 9U ) ) );
   488 16 2     *       return;
                      }
                      void g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( U16 u16t_Addr1, U16 u16t_Addr2, U8 u8t_Data )
                      {
                          U32 u32t_Addr;
                          U32 u32t_MAX_Addr;
   498 17 0    (T)    g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData
   502 17 1     *       u32t_Addr = (0x00100000UL) + u16t_Addr1 + u16t_Addr2;
   503 17 2     *       u32t_MAX_Addr = (0x00100000UL) + 0x3FFU;
   505 17 3    (T)(F)   if( ( u32t_Addr >= (0x00100000UL) )
                          &&  ( u32t_Addr <= u32t_MAX_Addr ) )
                          {
   508 17 4     *         EEPROM_SetByte( ( EEPROM_TAddress )u32t_Addr, u8t_Data );
                          }
   511 17 5     *       return;
                      }
                      U8 u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( U16 u16t_Addr1, U16 u16t_Addr2 )
                      {
   521 18 0    (T)    u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData
   522 18 1     *       U8 u8t_data = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          U32 u32t_Addr;
   525 18 2     *       u32t_Addr = (0x00100000UL) + u16t_Addr1 + u16t_Addr2;
   526 18 3     *       EEPROM_GetByte( ( EEPROM_TAddress )u32t_Addr, &u8t_data );
   528 18 4     *       return( u8t_data );
                      }
                      void g_InlineModeEEPROMClear( void )
                      {
   552 19 0    (T)    g_InlineModeEEPROMClear
   553 19 1     *       u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineMod_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
   554 19 2     *       g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 4U ) ), u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineMod_F );
   556 19 3     *       return;    
                      }
                      void g_InlineModeSpeedChangeFlagEEPROMSet( void )
                      {
   566 20 0    (T)    g_InlineModeSpeedChangeFlagEEPROMSet
   567 20 1     *       u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineModSpdChange_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   568 20 2     *       g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 100U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 5U ) ), u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineModSpdChange_F );
   570 20 3     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_DiagDataSave_OpenFail( U16 index )
                      {
   580 21 0    (T)    s_DiagDataSave_OpenFail
   581 21 1     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] = 0x0000U;
   582 21 2     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState &0x0003U );
   583 21 3     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorCtrl_DoorState &0x000FU ) << 2u;
   584 21 4     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( u16g_SysDiag_SystemStatus &( ( U16 )( 0x0001 ) ) ) << 6U;
   585 21 5     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_PlayProtectLvl &0x0004U ) >> 2U ) << 7U;
   586 21 6     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F &0x0001U ) << 8U;
   587 21 7     *       DiagData.OpenFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorTemp_F &0x0001U ) << 9U;
   589 21 8     *       return;    
                      }
                      void s_DiagDataSave_CloseFail( U16 index)
                      {
   599 22 0    (T)    s_DiagDataSave_CloseFail
   600 22 1     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] = 0x0000U;
   601 22 2     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState &0x0003U );
   602 22 3     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorCtrl_DoorState &0x000FU ) << 2U;
   603 22 4     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( u16g_SysDiag_SystemStatus &( ( U16 )( 0x0001 ) ) ) << 6U;
   604 22 5     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_PlayProtectLvl &0x0004U ) >> 2U ) << 7U;
   605 22 6     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F &0x0001U ) << 8U;
   606 22 7     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorTemp_F &0x0001U ) << 9U;
   607 22 8     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F &0x0001U ) << 10U;
   608 22 9     *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorPressure_F &0x0001U ) << 11U;
   609 22 10    *       DiagData.CloseFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_IgnSwSta &0x0003U ) << 12U;
   611 22 11    *       return;    
                      }
                      void s_DiagDataSave_AssistFail( U16 index)
                      {
   621 23 0    (T)    s_DiagDataSave_AssistFail
   622 23 1     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] = 0x0000U;
   623 23 2     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState &0x0003U );
   624 23 3     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorCtrl_DoorState &0x000FU ) << 2U;
   625 23 4     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( u16g_SysDiag_SystemStatus &( ( U16 )( 0x0001 ) ) ) << 6U;
   626 23 5     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_PlayProtectLvl &0x0004U ) >> 2U ) << 7U;
   627 23 6     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F &0x0001U ) << 8U;
   628 23 7     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorTemp_F &0x0001U ) << 9U;
   629 23 8     *       DiagData.AassistFailure[index] |= ( ( U16 )u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_IgnSwSta &0x0003U ) << 10U;
   631 23 9     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_DiagEepromWrite( U8 u8t_FailMode )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_DiagDataHi;
                          U8 u8t_DiagDataLo;
   641 24 0    (T)    s_DiagEepromWrite
   646 24 1    (T)(F)   if( u8t_FailMode == ( ( U8 )( 1U ) ) )
                          {
   648 24 2     *         u8s_Open_Idx++;
   649 24 3    (T)(F)     if( u8s_Open_Idx >= 3U )
                              {
   651 24 4     *           u8s_Open_Idx = 0U;
                              }
   653 24 5     *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 18U ) ), u8s_Open_Idx );
   655 24 6     *         s_DiagDataSave_OpenFail( u8s_Open_Idx );
   656 24 7     *         u8t_DiagDataLo = ( U8 )( DiagData.OpenFailure[u8s_Open_Idx] &0x00FFU );
   657 24 8     *         u8t_DiagDataHi = ( U8 )( DiagData.OpenFailure[u8s_Open_Idx] >> 8U );
   659 24 9     *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 0U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Open_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataLo );
   660 24 10    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 1U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Open_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataHi );
                          }
   664 24 11   (T)(F)   if( u8t_FailMode == ( ( U8 )( 2U ) ) )
                          {
   666 24 12    *         u8s_Close_Idx++;
   667 24 13   (T)(F)     if( u8s_Close_Idx >= 3U )
                              {
   669 24 14    *           u8s_Close_Idx = 0U;
                              }
   672 24 15    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 19U ) ), u8s_Close_Idx );
   674 24 16    *         s_DiagDataSave_CloseFail( u8s_Close_Idx );
   675 24 17    *         u8t_DiagDataLo = ( U8 )( DiagData.CloseFailure[u8s_Close_Idx] &0x00FFU );
   676 24 18    *         u8t_DiagDataHi = ( U8 )( DiagData.CloseFailure[u8s_Close_Idx] >> 8U );
   678 24 19    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 6U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Close_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataLo );
   679 24 20    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 7U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Close_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataHi );
                          }
   683 24 21   (T)(F)   if( u8t_FailMode == ( ( U8 )( 3U ) ) )   
                          {
   685 24 22    *         u8s_Assist_Idx++;
   686 24 23   (T)(F)     if( u8s_Assist_Idx >= 3U )
                              {
   688 24 24    *           u8s_Assist_Idx = 0U;
                              }
   691 24 25    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 20U ) ), u8s_Assist_Idx );
   693 24 26    *         s_DiagDataSave_AssistFail( u8s_Assist_Idx );
   694 24 27    *         u8t_DiagDataLo = ( U8 )( DiagData.AassistFailure[u8s_Assist_Idx] &0x00FFU );
   695 24 28    *         u8t_DiagDataHi = ( U8 )( DiagData.AassistFailure[u8s_Assist_Idx] >> 8U );
   697 24 29    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 12U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Assist_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataLo );
   698 24 30    *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 13U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8s_Assist_Idx * 2U ), u8t_DiagDataHi );
                          }
   701 24 31    *       return;
                      }
                      void s_OverPosWrite( void )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_TempData;
   711 25 0    (T)    s_OverPosWrite
   714 25 1     *       u8t_TempData = ( U8 )s16g_SysOptCtrl_OverPosOffset;
   715 25 2    (T)(F)   if( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) )
                          {
   717 25 3     *         g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 500U ) ), 20U, u8t_TempData );
                          }
                          else 
   719 25 4    (T)(F)     if( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) )
                          {
   721 25 5     *           g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 500U ) ), 21U, u8t_TempData );
                          }
                          else 
   723 25 6    (T)(F)       if( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                          {
   725 25 7     *             g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 500U ) ), 22U, u8t_TempData );
                          }
                          else 
   727 25 8    (T)(F)         if( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x76U ) ) )
                          {
   729 25 9     *               g_SysEepromCtrl_WriteData( ( ( U16 )( 500U ) ), 23U, u8t_TempData );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   733 25 10    *               ;  
                          }
   736 25 11    *       return;
                      }
                      void s_DiagEepromRead( void )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Index;
                          U16 u16t_ReadData;
   746 26 0    (T)    s_DiagEepromRead
   750 26 1     *       u8s_Open_Idx = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 18U ) ) );
   751 26 2     *       u8s_Close_Idx = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 19U ) ) );
   752 26 3     *       u8s_Assist_Idx = u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 20U ) ) );
   754 26 4    (T)(F)   for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < 3U ; u8t_Index++ )
                          {
   756 26 5     *         u16t_ReadData = ( U16 )u8g_SysEepromCtrl_ReadData( ( ( U16 )( 200U ) ), ( ( U16 )( 0U ) ) + ( ( U16 )u8t_Index * 2U ) );

                      static U16 u16s_BatteryLow_Check( void )
                      {
                          U16 u16t_SysDiagSts;
   185 4 0     (T)    u16s_BatteryLow_Check
   188 4 1      *       switch( u8s_Diag_BatteryLow_State )
                      	{
   190 4 2     (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ):
   191 4 3     (T)(F)       if( ( u16g_ApiIn_Vsup <= ( ( U16 )( 8.50F * ( F32 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) ) ) )
                                  &&  ( ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState == ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ) )  
                                  || ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > 100 ) ) )
                                  {
   195 4 4      *             u16s_Diag_LowBattErrTm++;
   196 4 5     (T)(F)         if( u16s_Diag_LowBattErrTm > ( ( U16 )( 500.0F / ( F32 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) ) )
                                      {
   198 4 6      *               u16s_Diag_LowBattErrTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
   199 4 7      *               u16t_SysDiagSts = ( ( U16 )( 0x0001 ) );
   200 4 8      *               u8s_Diag_BatteryLow_State = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );

                                      else

                                      }
                                  }

   210 4 11     *             u16t_SysDiagSts = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000 ) );
                                  }
   212 4 12     *           break;
   214 4 13    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ):
   215 4 14    (T)(F)       if( ( u16g_ApiIn_Vsup < ( ( ( U16 )( 8.50F * ( F32 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) ) ) + ( ( U16 )( 0.50F * ( F32 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) ) ) ) )
                                  &&  ( ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState == ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ) )  
                                  || ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > 100 ) ) )
                                  {
   219 4 15     *             u16s_Diag_LowBattErrTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
   220 4 16     *             u16t_SysDiagSts = ( ( U16 )( 0x0001 ) );

   224 4 17     *             u16s_Diag_LowBattErrTm++;

                                      {

   228 4 20     *               u16t_SysDiagSts = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   229 4 21     *               u8s_Diag_BatteryLow_State = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                                      }
                                      else

                                      }
                                  }

   240 4 26     *           u16t_SysDiagSts = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000 ) );

   242 4 28     *           break;
                          }
   245 4 29     *       return( u16t_SysDiagSts );

   468 7 6     (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )
                          {

                          {

                          else
                          {
   480 7 10     *           ;     
                          }
   483 7 11     *       return;
                      }

                                  {

   592 10 11    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_BattHighSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );

                                  else
                                  {
   596 10 12   (T)(F)         if( ( u16g_SysDiag_SystemStatus &( ( U16 )( 0x0002 ) ) ) == ( ( U16 )( 0x0000 ) ) )
                                      {
   598 10 13    *               u16s_BattHighAutoStopCnt = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
   599 10 14    *               u8g_DoorPreCtrl_BattHighSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );

   604 10 16   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ):     
   605 10 17    *           u16s_BattHighAutoStopCnt++;
   606 10 18   (T)(F)       if( ( u16s_BattHighAutoStopCnt > 1000U )   
                                  ||  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                                  ||  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_LatchState == ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ) )

                      void s_AntipinchDetect_Open( void )
                      {
                          U16 u16t_CurrLoadPeak;
                          U16 u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting;
                          U16 u16t_CurrLoadNormal; 
                          S16 s16t_CloseDisplacement;
                          S16 s16t_OpenDisplacement;
   670 12 0    (T)    s_AntipinchDetect_Open
   677 12 1     *       S16 s16t_TempA = 0;
   678 12 2     *       S16 s16t_TempB = 0;
   679 12 3     *       S16 s16t_Ratio = 0;
   680 12 4     *       S16 s16t_RatioLimit = 0;
   682 12 5    (T)(F)   if( ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorRoll >= ( ( S16 )( 4 ) ) )
                          ||  ( ( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) )
                              ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorRoll <= ( ( S16 )( -2 ) ) ) )      
                          ||  ( ( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                              ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x76U ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorRoll >= ( ( S16 )( 2 ) ) ) ) )     
                          {
   690 12 6     *         u16t_CurrLoadPeak = ( ( U16 )( 21000U ) );            
   691 12 7     *         u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting = ( ( U16 )( 21000U ) );   
   692 12 8     *         u16t_CurrLoadNormal = ( ( U16 )( 18000U ) );              
                          }
                          else
                          {
   696 12 9     *         u16t_CurrLoadPeak = ( ( U16 )( 19000U ) );                  
   697 12 10    *         u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting = ( ( U16 )( 19000U ) );         
   698 12 11    *         u16t_CurrLoadNormal = ( ( U16 )( 14000U ) );                    
                          }
   701 12 12   (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature > ( ( U8 )( 0x28U ) ) )
                          {
   703 12 13    *         s16t_Ratio = 100;
                          }
                          else
                          {
   707 12 14    *         s16t_TempA  = ( 100 + ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_AntipinchTempRaito - 100 ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) / ( 10 - 40 );
   708 12 15    *         s16t_TempB  = 100 - ( s16t_TempA * 40 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) ); 
   709 12 16    *         s16t_Ratio = ( s16t_TempA  * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature  / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB ;
                          }
   712 12 17    *       s16t_RatioLimit = 100 + ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_AntipinchTempRaito;   
   714 12 18   (T)(F)   if( s16t_Ratio > s16t_RatioLimit)
                          {
   716 12 19    *         s16t_Ratio = s16t_RatioLimit;
                          }
   719 12 20    *       u16t_CurrLoadPeak = u16t_CurrLoadPeak / ( U16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) * ( U16 )s16t_Ratio ;
   720 12 21    *       u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting = u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting / ( U16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) * ( U16 )s16t_Ratio ;
   721 12 22    *       u16t_CurrLoadNormal = u16t_CurrLoadNormal / ( U16 )( ( U8 )( 100U ) ) * ( U16 )s16t_Ratio ;
   722 12 23    *       s16t_OpenDisplacement = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition - s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP;   
   724 12 24   (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysUds_UsAutoOpenEn_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          &&  ( ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                            ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN ) ) )
                          {        
   728 12 25   (T)(F)     if( ( ( ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorCountSpeed < u16g_SysOptCtrl_AintipinchDetectSpd )
                                  ||  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl > u16t_CurrLoadPeak ) )
                                &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl < ( ( U16 )( 60000U ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( u16g_DoorCtrl_DrMovgTm > ( ( U16 )( 1000U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( ( ( s16t_OpenDisplacement < ( ( S16 )( 300 ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl > u16t_CurrLoadMotorStarting ) )
                                ||  ( ( s16t_OpenDisplacement >= ( ( S16 )( 300 ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl > u16t_CurrLoadNormal ) ) ) )
                              {
   737 12 26    *           u16s_OpenOverLoadTm++;
   738 12 27   (T)(F)       if( ( s16t_OpenDisplacement <= ( ( S16 )( 150 ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u16s_OpenOverLoadTm > ( ( U16 )( 2000U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) ) )     
                                  {
   741 12 28    *             u16s_OpenOverLoadTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
   742 12 29    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   743 12 30    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                                  }
                                  else 
   745 12 31   (T)(F)         if( ( s16t_OpenDisplacement > ( ( S16 )( 150 ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u16s_OpenOverLoadTm > ( ( U16 )( 50U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) ) )     
                                  {                 
   748 12 32    *               u16s_OpenOverLoadTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
   749 12 33    *               u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   750 12 34    *               u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchLin_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                                  }

                                  {

                                  }

                          }

                          }

                      }

                                    &&  ( s16t_CloseDisplacement > 700 ) )
                                  ||  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl > u16t_CurrLoadPeak )

                          &&  ( ( u16g_ApiIn_LinRx_VehicleSpeed <= u16t_OpLimitVehicleSpeed )

                      static void s_AntipinchAction( void )
                      {
   960 16 0    (T)    s_AntipinchAction
   961 16 1     *       u8s_AntiPinch_RunCheck_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
   963 16 2     *       switch( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts )
                      	{
   965 16 3    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ):     
   966 16 4     *           s_AntipinchDetect_Open( );
   967 16 5     *           s_AntipinchDetect_Close( );
   968 16 6     *           break;
   970 16 7    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ):  
   971 16 8    (T)(F)       if ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP )
                                  {
   973 16 9     *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                                  }
   975 16 10    *           break;
   977 16 11   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ):  
   978 16 12   (T)(F)       if ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP )
                                  {
   980 16 13    *             s_AntipinchPopupCheck( );
                                  }
   982 16 14    *           break;
   984 16 15   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) ):

                                  {

                                  }
   989 16 18    *           break;
   991 16 19   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ): 
   992 16 20    *           s_AntipinchDetect_Open( );
   993 16 21   (T)(F)       if ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP )
                                  {
   995 16 22    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                                  }
   997 16 23    *           break;
   999 16 24   (T)        default:
  1000 16 25    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1001 16 26    *           break;
                      	}

  1005 16 28    *       return;
                      }

                      static void s_ReverseOperationDetect( void )
                      {
                          S16 s16t_PosDiff;
  1050 19 0    (T)    s_ReverseOperationDetect
  1053 19 1    (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN ) )
                          {   
  1056 19 2    (T)(F)     if( s16s_AstOpenPos_Max < s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                              {
  1058 19 3     *           s16s_AstOpenPos_Max = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
                              }
  1061 19 4    (T)(F)     if( s16s_AstOpenPos_Min > s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                              {
  1063 19 5     *           s16s_AstOpenPos_Min = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
                              }
  1065 19 6     *         s16t_PosDiff = s16s_AstOpenPos_Max - s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
  1067 19 7    (T)(F)     if( ( s16t_PosDiff >= ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) )
                              &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) ) ) 
                              {
  1070 19 8     *           u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorStop_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                              }
                          }
  1074 19 9    (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_CLOSE )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE ) )
                          {
  1077 19 10   (T)(F)     if( s16s_AstClosePos_Max < s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                              {
  1079 19 11    *           s16s_AstClosePos_Max = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
                              }
  1082 19 12   (T)(F)     if( ( s16s_AstClosePos_Min > s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                              &&  ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition >= ( ( S8 )( 0x00 ) ) ) )
                              {

                              }
  1088 19 14    *         s16t_PosDiff = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition - s16s_AstClosePos_Min;
  1089 19 15   (T)(F)     if( ( s16t_PosDiff >= ( ( S16 )( 50 ) ) )
                              &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection == ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ) ) )
                              {
  1092 19 16    *           u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorStop_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                              }
                          }
  1096 19 17    *       return;
                      }

                      	{

                      		{

                      		}

                      }

  1143 21 3     *         u8s_SpdDownChk = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );

                              &&  ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorSpdRatio > ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) ) ) )

  1157 21 9     *           u16s_DecelerationCnt++;
  1158 21 10    *           s16s_SpdRatioSum_Old = s16s_SpdRatioSum_Old_Decel;
                      		}
  1161 21 11   (T)(F)     if( u16s_DecelerationCnt > ( ( U16 )( 200U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) ) 
                      		{
  1163 21 12    *           u8s_SpdDownChk = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
  1164 21 13    *           u8s_SpdDownChk_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );

                          }
  1168 21 14    *       s16s_SpdRatioSum += s16g_ApiIn_MotorSpdRatio;
  1171 21 15   (T)(F)   if( u8s_SpdDownChk == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )	
                      	{

                          }

                          }

                      }

                      }
                      static void s_DampingDetect( void )

  1231 23 1    (T)(F)   if( ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed > ( ( U16 )( 45000U ) ) )

  1239 23 5     *           u16s_ShortBrakeCnt = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );

                          {
  1247 23 9    (T)(F)     if( ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorCountSpeed <= ( ( U16 )( 3U ) ) )
                              ||  ( u8s_DampingDirection != u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection ) )
                              {

  1251 23 11   (T)(F)       if( ( u16s_ShortBrakeCnt > ( ( U16 )( 500U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )	
                                  ||  ( u8s_DampingDirection != u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection ) )
                                  {

                                      &&  ( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenDeactiv_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )

                      static void s_ReboundProtection( void )
                      {
                          S16 s16t_RefPos;
  1277 24 0    (T)    s_ReboundProtection
  1280 24 1     *       switch( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts )
                      	{
  1282 24 2    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ):              
  1283 24 3     *           s_ReboundProtection_Ready( );
  1284 24 4     *           break;
  1286 24 5    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ):      
  1287 24 6     *           s_ReboundProtection_Return( );
  1288 24 7     *           break;
  1290 24 8    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) ):           
  1291 24 9     *           u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeOn_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
  1292 24 10    *           u16s_ReboundPrtctTm++;
  1293 24 11    *           s16s_SpdRatioSum_Rebound += s16g_ApiIn_MotorSpdRatio;
  1294 24 12   (T)(F)       if( s16s_SpdRatioSum_Rebound < -100 )
                                  {
  1296 24 13    *             u16s_ReboundReleaseTm++;
                                  }
  1299 24 14   (T)(F)       if( ( u16s_ReboundPrtctTm > ( ( U16 )( 700U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )
                                  ||  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorCountSpeed < ( ( U8 )( 3U ) ) )
                                  ||  ( u16s_ReboundReleaseTm > ( ( U16 )( 300U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) ) )
                                  {
  1303 24 15    *             u16s_ReboundPrtctTm = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1304 24 16    *             u16s_ReboundReleaseTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
  1305 24 17    *             s16s_SpdRatioSum_Rebound = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
  1306 24 18    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) );
                                  }
  1309 24 19    *           s16t_RefPos = s16g_ApiIn_OverPos - ( s16g_ApiIn_OverPos * 5 / 100 );
  1312 24 20   (T)(F)       if( s16s_MaxOpenPos < s16t_RefPos )
                                  {
  1314 24 21    *             s16s_MaxOpenPos = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
  1315 24 22    *             u16s_ReboundPrtctTm = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1316 24 23    *             u16s_ReboundReleaseTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
  1317 24 24    *             s16s_SpdRatioSum_Rebound = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
  1318 24 25    *             u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) );
                                  }
  1320 24 26    *           break;
  1322 24 27   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ):        
  1323 24 28   (T)(F)       if( ( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_DeactivEnter_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenDeactiv_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeUse_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) )
                                  {
  1327 24 29    *             u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeOn_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                                  }
  1329 24 30    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1330 24 31    *           break;   
  1332 24 32   (T)        default:
  1333 24 33    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1334 24 34    *           break;
                      	}
  1337 24 35    *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_ReboundProtection_Ready( void )

  1350 25 1     *       u8t_ReboundDetection = u8s_ReboundDetection( );
  1351 25 2    (T)(F)   if( u8t_ReboundDetection == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )

  1355 25 5     *         u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
  1356 25 6     *         u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeOn_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
  1357 25 7     *         s16s_MaxOpenPos = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;

                      }
                      static void s_ReboundProtection_Return( void )

  1371 26 1    (T)(F)   if( s16s_MaxOpenPos < s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                          {

  1376 26 3    (T)(F)   if ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )

  1380 26 5     *       u16s_ReboundPrtctTm2++;
  1380 26 6     *       ;
  1382 26 7    (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorCountSpeed > ( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) )
                                  &&  ( u16s_ReboundPrtctTm <= ( ( U16 )( 500U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) ) )
                          {
  1386 26 8     *         u16s_ReboundPrtctTm = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1387 26 9     *         u16s_ReboundReleaseTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );

  1390 26 12    *         u8g_DoorPreCtrl_ReboundPrtctSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) );
                          }
                          else 
  1392 26 13   (T)(F)     if( u16s_ReboundPrtctTm > ( ( U16 )( 500U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )
                          {
  1394 26 14    *           u16s_ReboundPrtctTm = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1395 26 15    *           u16s_ReboundPrtctTm2 = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );

                          }
                          else
                          {
  1401 26 18    *           ;    
                          }
  1404 26 19   (T)(F)   if( u16s_ReboundPrtctTm2 > ( ( U16 )( 1200U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )
                          {
  1406 26 20    *         u16s_ReboundPrtctTm = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  1407 26 21    *         u16s_ReboundPrtctTm2 = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );

  1413 26 24    *       return;
                      }

                          U8 u8t_Result;
  1423 27 0    (T)    u8s_ReboundDetection
  1426 27 1    (T)(F)   if( ( ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                            ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP ) )
                          &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorDirection == ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) ) )
                          &&  ( ( ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > ( s16g_ApiIn_OverPos - ( ( S16 )( 300 ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed > ( ( U16 )( 15000U ) ) ) )    
                            ||  ( ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > ( s16g_ApiIn_OverPos - ( ( S16 )( 200 ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed > ( ( U16 )( 12000U ) ) ) )    
                            ||  ( ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > ( s16g_ApiIn_OverPos - ( ( S16 )( 100 ) ) ) )
                              &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed > ( ( U16 )( 8000U ) ) ) ) )  
                          &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) )
                          {
  1437 27 2     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
  1441 27 3     *         u8t_Result = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
  1444 27 4     *       return( u8t_Result );
                      }

  1469 28 7    (T)(F)     if( ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed <= ( ( U16 )( 2120U ) ) )              
                              &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_MotorCountSpeed <= ( ( U8 )( 4U ) ) )

                      static void s_AssistDeactivation_CloseChk( void )
                      {

  1560 30 1    (T)(F)   if( ( ( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) )
                              ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )
                            &&  ( ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorPitch >= ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) )
                              ||  ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorRoll <= ( ( S16 )( -4 ) ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) )
                          ||  ( ( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                              ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x76U ) ) ) )
                            &&  ( ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorPitch >= ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) )
                              ||  ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_DoorRoll >= ( ( S16 )( 4 ) ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) ) )

                              &&  ( u16g_MotorCtrl_TargetSpeed == ( ( U16 )( 16300U ) ) )

                              &&  ( u16g_ApiIn_MotorCurrLvl < ( ( U16 )( 15000U ) ) ) )

  1632 31 14   (T)(F)       if( u16s_EncoderFailCnt >= ( ( U16 )( 50U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )

                      static S16 s16s_DoorStopPosition_AssistClose( S16 s16t_Data )

  1930 38 2    (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_DeactivEnter_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )

                              {

  1935 38 5     *           s16g_DoorCtrl_StopPosAuto = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
                              }

                          }
  1940 38 7    (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenDeactiv_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )                    
                          {
  1942 38 8    (T)(F)     if( s16s_DoorStopPos < s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition )
                              {
  1944 38 9     *           s16s_DoorStopPos = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;

                              }
  1947 38 11    *         s16t_Temp = s16s_DoorStopPos;
                          }
  1950 38 12   (T)(F)   if( ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition >= s16g_ApiIn_FullPos ) 
                          &&  ( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl > ( ( S16 )( -4 ) ) ) )
                          {
  1953 38 13    *         s16s_DoorStopPos = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
  1954 38 14    *         s16g_DoorCtrl_StopPosAuto = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
  1955 38 15    *         s16t_Temp = s16s_DoorStopPos;
                          }
  1958 38 16    *       return( s16t_Temp );
                      }

                      	S16 s16t_StopPos;

                      	{

  1980 39 5     *         s16t_CloseStep =     ( ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) + ( 60 * s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl / 10 ) );            
  1981 39 6     *         s16t_CloseLongStep = ( ( ( S16 )( 50 ) ) + ( 50 * s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl / 10 ) );

                      	{

  1986 39 9     *           s16t_OpenLongStep = -( ( ( S16 )( 50 ) ) - ( 40 * s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl / 10 ) );        
  1987 39 10    *           s16t_CloseStep =     ( 3 );

  1993 39 13    *           s16t_OpenLongStep = -( ( ( S16 )( 50 ) ) - 30 );                  
  1994 39 14    *           s16t_CloseStep =     ( ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) );

                              {

                              }

                      {
  2102 41 0    (T)    s_IsDrMov_FullLatch_StopPosChk
  2103 41 1     *       u16s_FullLatchMvTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
  2104 41 2     *       s16s_DoorPreCtrl_StopPos = s16g_DoorCtrl_StopPosAuto;
  2105 41 3     *       u8g_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
  2107 41 4     *       return;
                      }
                      void s_IsDrMov_FullLatch_MoveChk( void )
                      {
  2117 42 0    (T)    s_IsDrMov_FullLatch_MoveChk
  2118 42 1    (T)(F)   if( u16s_FullLatchMvTm == ( ( U16 )( 200U / ( ( U8 )( 5U ) ) ) ) )
                          {
  2121 42 2    (T)(F)     if( s16s_DrMovPosDiff > 10 )
                              {
  2123 42 3     *           u8s_DrMovDir = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                              }
                              else 
  2125 42 4    (T)(F)       if( s16s_DrMovPosDiff < -10 )
                              {
  2127 42 5     *             u8s_DrMovDir = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
                              }
                              else
                              {
  2131 42 6     *             u8s_DrMovDir = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                              }
  2134 42 7     *         u16s_FullLatchMvTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
  2135 42 8    (T)(F)     if( ( s16s_DrMovPosDiff > 100 )         
                              ||  ( s16s_DrMovPosDiff < -100 ) )      
                              {
  2138 42 9     *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMv_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
  2139 42 10    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
  2140 42 11    *           u8s_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvDir_Old = u8s_DrMovDir;
                              }
                          }
  2144 42 12    *       return;
                      }
                      void s_IsDrMov_FullLatch_StopChk( void )

  2154 43 0    (T)    s_IsDrMov_FullLatch_StopChk

                          {
  2157 43 2    (T)(F)     if( s16s_DrMovPosDiff > 10 )
                              {
  2159 43 3     *           u8s_DrMovDir = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );

  2161 43 4    (T)(F)       if( s16s_DrMovPosDiff < -10 )
                              {
  2163 43 5     *             u8s_DrMovDir = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
                              }
                              else
                              {

                              }
  2170 43 7     *         u16s_FullLatchMvTm = ( ( U16 )( 0x0000U ) );
  2171 43 8    (T)(F)     if( u8s_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvDir_Old != u8s_DrMovDir )          
                              {
  2173 43 9     *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMv_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  2174 43 10    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
  2175 43 11    *           u8s_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvDir_Old = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                              }
                              else
                              {
  2179 43 12    *           s16s_DoorPreCtrl_StopPos = s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
                              }
  2182 43 13    *         u8s_DoorPreCtrl_FullLatchMvDir_Old = u8s_DrMovDir;
                          }
  2185 43 14    *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_UnfavorableTemperatureCheck( void )
                      {
  2195 44 0    (T)    s_UnfavorableTemperatureCheck
  2196 44 1    (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature < ( ( U8 )( 30U ) ) )
                          {
  2198 44 2     *         u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorTemp_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );

                          else

                      static void s_UnfavorablePressureCheck( void )
                      {
  2215 45 0    (T)    s_UnfavorablePressureCheck
  2216 45 1    (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_DrvVentilationLevel >= ( ( U8 )( 0x07U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_AsstVentilationLevel >= ( ( U8 )( 0x07U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_RearVentilationLevel >= ( ( U8 )( 0x07U ) ) )
                          ||  ( ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_AsstSdWdwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_DrvrSdWdwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_RrLftWdwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_RrRtWdwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_SunRoofOpnSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_DrvDrSwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_AsstDrSwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_RrLftDrSwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_RrRtDrSwSta == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) ) )
                          {
  2229 45 2     *         u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorPressure_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
  2233 45 3     *         u8g_DoorPreCtrl_UnfavorPressure_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
  2236 45 4     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_AstOutCompensate( void )
                      {
                          S16 s16t_TempA;
                          S16 s16t_TempB;
  2246 46 0    (T)    s_AstOutCompensate
  2250 46 1    (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) ) )
                          {
  2253 46 2     *         s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempRatio_Open = ( S16 )u8g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Open_TempRatio;
  2254 46 3     *         s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempRatio_Close = ( S16 )u8g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempRatio;
  2256 46 4    (T)(F)     if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature <= ( ( U8 )( 0x0AU ) ) )                   
                              {
  2258 46 5     *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenSlope = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30OpGain;
  2259 46 6     *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstCloseSlope = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30ClGain;
  2261 46 7     *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Open = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Open_TempOffset;
  2262 46 8     *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Close = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempOffset;
                              }
                              else 
  2264 46 9    (T)(F)       if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature <= ( ( U8 )( 0x1EU ) ) )              
                              {
  2266 46 10    *             s16t_TempA = ( s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30OpGain - s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10OpGain ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 10 - 30 );
  2267 46 11    *             s16t_TempB = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30OpGain - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2268 46 12    *             s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenSlope = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;
  2269 46 13    *             s16t_TempA = ( s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30ClGain - s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10ClGain ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 10 - 30 );
  2270 46 14    *             s16t_TempB = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM30ClGain - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2271 46 15    *             s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstCloseSlope = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;
  2273 46 16    *             s16t_TempA = ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Open_TempOffset ) / ( 10 - 60 );
  2274 46 17    *             s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Open_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10 );
  2275 46 18    *             s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Open = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature ) + s16t_TempB;
  2276 46 19    *             s16t_TempA = ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempOffset ) / ( 10 - 60 );
  2277 46 20    *             s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10  );
  2278 46 21    *             s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Close = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature ) + s16t_TempB;
                              }
                              else 
  2280 46 22   (T)(F)         if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature <= ( ( U8 )( 0x3CU ) ) )              
                              {
  2282 46 23    *               s16t_TempA = ( s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10OpGain - s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrP20OpGain ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 30 - 60 );
  2283 46 24    *               s16t_TempB = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10OpGain - ( s16t_TempA * 30 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2284 46 25    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenSlope = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;
  2285 46 26    *               s16t_TempA = ( s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10ClGain - s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrP20ClGain ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 30 - 60 );
  2286 46 27    *               s16t_TempB = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrM10ClGain - ( s16t_TempA * 30 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2287 46 28    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstCloseSlope = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;

  2290 46 30    *               s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Open_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );

  2292 46 32    *               s16t_TempA = ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempOffset ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 10 - 60 );
  2293 46 33    *               s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_Close_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2294 46 34    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Close = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;
                              }
                              else                                                                        
                              {
  2298 46 35    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenSlope = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrP20OpGain;

                              }

                          else

                               ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )
                          {
  2307 46 40    *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempRatio_Open = ( S16 )u8g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Open_TempRatio;
  2308 46 41    *           s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempRatio_Close = ( S16 )u8g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Close_TempRatio;

  2313 46 44    *             s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstCloseSlope = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_RrM30ClGain;

                              {

  2327 46 54    *               s16t_TempA = ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Open_TempOffset ) * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 10 - 60 );
  2328 46 55    *               s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Open_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2329 46 56    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Open = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;
  2330 46 57    *               s16t_TempA = ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Close_TempOffset )  * ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) / ( 10 - 60 );
  2331 46 58    *               s16t_TempB = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RR_Close_TempOffset - ( s16t_TempA * 10 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2332 46 59    *               s16g_DoorPreCtrl_TempOffset_Close = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;

                              {

  2337 46 62    *                 s16t_TempB = s16g_SysEepromCtrl_RrM10OpGain - ( s16t_TempA * 30 / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) );
  2338 46 63    *                 s16g_DoorPreCtrl_AstOpenSlope = ( s16t_TempA * ( S16 )u8g_DoorPreCtrl_Temperature / ( S16 )( ( U8 )( 10U ) ) ) + s16t_TempB;

   193 1 5     (T)        case ST_AUTO_STOP:

   201 1 13     *           break;

   204 1 16     *           break;
   205 1 17    (T)        case ST_AUTO_CLOSE:
   206 1 18     *           s_DoorState_AutoClose( );

   208 1 20    (T)        case ST_ASIST_CLOSE:
   209 1 21     *           s_DoorState_AssistClose( );
   210 1 22     *           break;
   211 1 23    (T)        default:
   212 1 24     *           g_DoorState = ST_INITIALIZATION;
   213 1 25     *           break;

   216 1 26     *       return;
                      }

                      static void s_DoorState_TipToRun_Detection( U16 u16t_Spd,  U16 u16t_SpdTm )
                      {

   491 8 2      *       u16t_Tip2RunDetectSpeedTime = u16t_SpdTm;

                                 ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )

                      {

                          U16 u16t_RrD2AstOpGain;

  1379 28 1     *       u16t_FrD2AstOpGain = u16s_MoveStartOpen_GainMeasure_AstOpGain( u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrD2AstOpGain );
  1380 28 2     *       u16t_RrD2AstOpGain = u16s_MoveStartOpen_GainMeasure_AstOpGain( u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RrD2AstOpGain );
  1382 28 3    (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) ) )
                          {
  1385 28 4    (T)(F)     if( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl >= ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) ) )
                              {
  1387 28 5     *           s16g_DoorCtrl_AstOutputGainConst = ( ( ( ( ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrU2AstOpGain - ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrNoAstOpGain )                                                * 10 / ( ( S16 )( 8 ) ) ) * s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl ) / 10 )                                                + ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrNoAstOpGain;
  1390 28 6    (T)(F)       if( s16g_DoorCtrl_AstOutputGainConst > ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrU2AstOpGain )
                                  {
  1392 28 7     *             s16g_DoorCtrl_AstOutputGainConst = ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrU2AstOpGain;
                                  }
                              }
                              else
                              {
  1397 28 8     *           s16g_DoorCtrl_AstOutputGainConst = ( ( ( ( ( S16 )u16t_FrD2AstOpGain - ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrNoAstOpGain )                                                * 10 / ( ( S16 )( -8 ) ) ) * s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl) / 10 )
                                                                     + ( S16 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrNoAstOpGain;
  1400 28 9    (T)(F)       if( s16g_DoorCtrl_AstOutputGainConst < ( S16 )u16t_FrD2AstOpGain )

   169 2 2     (T)        case en_s_Motor_Stop_Free:
   170 2 3      *           s_MotorState_FreeStop( );
   171 2 4      *           break;        
   172 2 5     (T)        case en_s_Motor_Stop_ShortBrake:
   173 2 6      *           s_MotorState_ShortBrake( );
   174 2 7      *           break;
   175 2 8     (T)        case en_s_Motor_Mov_Open:
   176 2 9      *           s_MotorState_Open( );
   177 2 10     *           break;
   178 2 11    (T)        case en_s_Motor_Mov_Close:
   179 2 12     *           s_MotorState_Close( );
   180 2 13     *           break;
   182 2 14    (T)        default:
   183 2 15     *           s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Stop_Free;
   184 2 16     *           break;
                      	}
   187 2 17     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorCtrl( void )
                      {
   197 3 0     (T)    s_MotorCtrl
   198 3 1     (T)(F)   if( s_MotorState == en_s_Motor_Stop_ShortBrake )
                          {
   200 3 2      *         u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
                          else 
   202 3 3     (T)(F)     if( s_MotorState == en_s_Motor_Mov_Open )
                          {
   204 3 4      *           u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
                          }
                          else 
   206 3 5     (T)(F)       if( s_MotorState == en_s_Motor_Mov_Close )
                          {
   208 3 6      *             u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   212 3 7      *             u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
   215 3 8     (T)(F)   if( u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts_Old != u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts )
                          {
   217 3 9      *         u8g_DoorCtrl_StateChange_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );
                          }
   220 3 10     *       u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts_Old = u8g_MotorCtrl_MotorCtrlSts;
   222 3 11     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorState_FreeStop( void )
                      {
   232 4 0     (T)    s_MotorState_FreeStop
   233 4 1     (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_OPEN ) )
                          {
   238 4 2      *         s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Mov_Open;
                          }
                          else 
   240 4 3     (T)(F)     if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_CLOSE )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_CLOSE )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_CLOSE ) )
                          {
   245 4 4      *           s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Mov_Close;
                          }
                          else
                          {
   249 4 5     (T)(F)       if( u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeOn_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                              {
   251 4 6      *             s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Stop_ShortBrake;
                              }
                          }
   255 4 7      *       s32s_ComSpeed = ( ( S32 )( 0x00000000L ) );
   256 4 8      *       s16s_ComSpeed_Peak = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   257 4 9      *       s32s_RefSpeed_Mon = ( ( S32 )( 0x00000000L ) );
   259 4 10     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorState_ShortBrake( void )
                      {
   269 5 0     (T)    s_MotorState_ShortBrake
   270 5 1     (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorCtrl_ShortBrakeOn_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          {
   272 5 2     (T)(F)     if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN )
                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_OPEN )
                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_OPEN ) )
                              {
   277 5 3      *           s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Mov_Open;
                              }
                              else 
   279 5 4     (T)(F)       if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE )
                                   ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_CLOSE )
                                   ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_CLOSE )
                                   ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_CLOSE ) )
                              {
   284 5 5      *             s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Mov_Close;
                              }
                              else
                              {
   288 5 6     (T)(F)         if( ( g_DoorState == ST_INITIALIZATION )
                                  ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_FULL_CLOSE )
                                  ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP ) 
                                  ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_STOP ) )
                                  {
   293 5 7      *               s_MotorState = en_s_Motor_Stop_Free;
                                  }
                              }
                          }
   298 5 8      *       s32s_ComSpeed = ( ( S32 )( 0x00000000L ) );
   299 5 9      *       s16s_ComSpeed_Peak = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   301 5 10     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorState_Open( void )
                      {
   311 6 0     (T)    s_MotorState_Open
   312 6 1     (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE )

                          {

                          }
                          else
                          {
   321 6 3     (T)(F)     if( ( g_DoorState == ST_FULL_CLOSE )
                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_STOP )
                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_STOP ) )
                              {

                          }
   334 6 7      *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorState_Close( void )

                              ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_STOP ) )

                          }
   367 7 7      *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorSpeedModeSelection( void )
                      {
   377 8 0     (T)    s_MotorSpeedModeSelection
   380 8 1     (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysUds_UsAutoOpenEn_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          &&  ( ( u8g_DoorCtrl_DoorState == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                            ||  ( u8g_DoorCtrl_DoorState == ( ( U8 )( 0x0EU ) ) )
                            ||  ( ( u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineMod_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                              &&  ( u8g_SysEepromCtrl_InLineModSpdChange_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) ) ) ) )
                          {

                          } 
                          else 
   389 8 3     (T)(F)     if( ( u8g_SysUds_UsAutoOpenEn_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          &&  ( u8g_ApiIn_LinRx_USMDoorCloseSpeed == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) ) )
                          {
   393 8 4      *           u8s_SpeedMode = ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   397 8 5      *           u8s_SpeedMode = ( ( U8 )( 0x02U ) );
                          }
   401 8 6     (T)(F)   if( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x66U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x67U ) ) ) )
                          {
   404 8 7      *         s_MotorSpeedModeSelection_FrontSet( );
   406 8 8      *         s32s_AccelPos = ( ( S32 )( 500 ) );
   407 8 9      *         s32s_DecelPos = ( ( S32 )( 1200 ) );
   408 8 10     *         s32s_LatchLockPos = ( ( S32 )( 300 ) );
                          }
                          else 
   410 8 11    (T)(F)     if( ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x76U ) ) )
                               ||  ( u8g_SysOptCtrl_DeviceType == ( ( U8 )( 0x77U ) ) ) )

   413 8 12     *           s_MotorSpeedModeSelection_RearSet( );

   416 8 14     *           s32s_DecelPos = ( ( S32 )( 1200 ) );
   417 8 15     *           s32s_LatchLockPos = ( ( S32 )( 300 ) );

                               &&  ( u8g_SysUds_UsDoorCtrl == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) ) )
                          {
   422 8 17     *             s32s_StartSpeed = ( ( S32 )( 6000 ) );

   424 8 19     *             s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = ( ( S32 )( 10000 ) );      
   425 8 20     *             s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = ( ( S32 )( 10000 ) );  
   426 8 21     *             s32s_AccelPos = ( ( S32 )( 500 ) );
   427 8 22     *             s32s_DecelPos = ( ( S32 )( 1200 ) );
   428 8 23     *             s32s_LatchLockPos = ( ( S32 )( 300 ) );
                          }

   432 8 24     *             ;  
                          }
   435 8 25     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorSpeedModeSelection_FrontSet( void )
                      {
   445 9 0     (T)    s_MotorSpeedModeSelection_FrontSet
   446 9 1     (T)(F)   if( u8s_SpeedMode == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          {
   448 9 2      *         s32s_StartSpeed = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultStartSPD;
   449 9 3      *         s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultAccelSPD / 100 * 90;
   450 9 4      *         s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultDecelSPD / 100 * 90;
   451 9 5      *         s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultLatchSPD / 100 * 90;
                          }
                          else 
   454 9 6     (T)(F)     if( u8s_SpeedMode == ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) ) )
                          {
   456 9 7      *           s32s_StartSpeed = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultStartSPD;
   457 9 8      *           s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultAccelSPD / 100 * 115;
   458 9 9      *           s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultDecelSPD / 100 * 115;
   459 9 10     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultLatchSPD / 100 * 115;
                          }
                          else     
                          {
   463 9 11     *           s32s_StartSpeed = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultStartSPD;      
   464 9 12     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultAccelSPD;   
   465 9 13     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultDecelSPD;   
   466 9 14     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FrDefaultLatchSPD;   
                          }
   470 9 15    (T)(F)   if( s16g_DoorPreCtrl_SlopeLvl >= ( ( S16 )( 4 ) ) )   
                          {
   474 9 16     *         s32s_TargetSpeed_2 += 2900;        
   475 9 17     *         s32s_TargetSpeed_3 += 2900;        
                          }
   478 9 18    (T)(F)   if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_CompensateLvl == ( ( U8 )( 1U ) ) )
                          {
                          }
                          else 
   483 9 19    (T)(F)     if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_CompensateLvl == ( ( U8 )( 2U ) ) )
                          {
   485 9 20     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = s32s_TargetSpeed_2 + ( ( S32 )( 2000 ) ) + ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
   486 9 21     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = s32s_TargetSpeed_3 + ( ( S32 )( 2000 ) ) + ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
                          }
                          else 
   488 9 22    (T)(F)       if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_CompensateLvl == ( ( U8 )( 3U ) ) )
                          {
   490 9 23     *             s32s_StartSpeed = ( ( S32 )( 7000 ) );
   491 9 24     *             s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( ( S32 )( 14000 ) ); 
   492 9 25     *             s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = s32s_TargetSpeed_2 + ( ( S32 )( 6000 ) ) +( S32 ) u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
   493 9 26     *             s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = s32s_TargetSpeed_3 + ( ( S32 )( 6000 ) ) +( S32 ) u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
                          }
                          else 
   495 9 27    (T)(F)         if( u8g_DoorPreCtrl_CompensateLvl == ( ( U8 )( 4U ) ) )
                          {
   497 9 28     *               s32s_StartSpeed = ( ( S32 )( 7000 ) );
   498 9 29     *               s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( ( S32 )( 14000 ) ); 
   499 9 30     *               s32s_TargetSpeed_2 = s32s_TargetSpeed_2 + ( ( S32 )( 8000 ) ) + ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
   500 9 31     *               s32s_TargetSpeed_3 = s32s_TargetSpeed_3 + ( ( S32 )( 8000 ) ) + ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_FR_SpeedOffset;
                          }
                          else
                          {
   504 9 32     *               ;  
                          }
   507 9 33     *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorSpeedModeSelection_RearSet( void )
                      {

   518 10 1    (T)(F)   if( u8s_SpeedMode == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )

   529 10 8     *           s32s_TargetSpeed_1 = ( S32 )u16g_SysEepromCtrl_RrDefaultAccelSPD / 100 * 115;
