                      static void s_MotorSpeedCtrl( void )
                      {
   601 11 0    (T)    s_MotorSpeedCtrl
   602 11 1    (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_CLOSE ) )
                          {
   607 11 2     *         s_MotorSpeedCtrl_General( );
                          }
                          else 
   609 11 3    (T)(F)     if( ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_STOP )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_OPEN )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_CLOSE )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_OPEN )
                               ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_CLOSE ) ) 
                          {
   615 11 4     *           s_MotorSpeedCtrl_UserCtrl( );
                          }
                          else
                          {        
   619 11 5     *           s32s_RefSpeed_Mon = ( ( S32 )( 0x00000000L ) );
   620 11 6     *           s16s_PID_I_Err = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   621 11 7     *           s16s_PID_P_Err = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   622 11 8     *           s16s_PID_D_Err = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   623 11 9     *           s16s_PidErr1_Old = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   624 11 10    *           s16s_PidErr2_Old = ( ( S16 )( 0x0000 ) );
   625 11 11    *           u8g_DoorPreCtrl_DecelDrMovSpd_F = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );
                          }
   628 11 12    *       u16g_MotorCtrl_TargetSpeed = ( U16 )( u32g_Lib_ABS( s32s_ComSpeed ) );
   631 11 13   (T)(F)   if( u16g_MotorCtrl_TargetSpeed >= ( ( U16 )( 16300U ) ) ) 
                          {
   633 11 14    *         u16g_MotorCtrl_TargetSpeed = ( ( U16 )( 16300U ) );
                          }
   636 11 15    *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorSpeedCtrl_General( void )
                      {
   646 12 0    (T)    s_MotorSpeedCtrl_General
   647 12 1    (T)(F)   if( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_OPEN )
                          {
   649 12 2     *         s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoOpen( );
                          }
                          else 
   651 12 3    (T)(F)     if( g_DoorState == ST_AUTO_CLOSE )
                          {
   653 12 4     *           s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoClose( );
                          }
                          else 
   655 12 5    (T)(F)       if( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_OPEN )
                          {
   657 12 6     *             s_MotorSpdCtrl_AssistOpen( );
                          }
                          else 
   659 12 7    (T)(F)         if( g_DoorState == ST_ASIST_CLOSE )
                          {
   661 12 8     *               s_MotorSpdCtrl_AssistClose( );
                          }
                          else
                          {
   665 12 9     *               ;    
                          }
   668 12 10    *       return;
                      }
                      static void s_MotorSpeedCtrl_UserCtrl( void )
                      {
   678 13 0    (T)    s_MotorSpeedCtrl_UserCtrl
   679 13 1    (T)(F)   if( ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_STOP )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_OPEN )
                          ||  ( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_CLOSE ) )
                          {
   683 13 2     *         s_MotorSpdCtrl_UserCtrlMove( );
                          }
                          else 
   685 13 3    (T)(F)     if( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_OPEN )
                          {
   687 13 4    (T)(F)       if( u8g_DoorCtrl_PositioningComplet_F == ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ))
                              {
   689 13 5     *             s_MotorSpdCtrl_UserCtrlPositioning( );
                              }
                              else
                              {
   693 13 6     *             s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoOpen( );
                              }
                          }
                          else 
   696 13 7    (T)(F)       if( g_DoorState == ST_USER_CTRL_AUTO_CLOSE )
                          {
   698 13 8     *             s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoClose( );
                          }
                          else

                      static void s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoOpen( void )

   715 14 0    (T)    s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoOpen
   718 14 1    (T)(F)   if ( (u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts == ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) ))

   721 14 2    (T)(F)     if( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition <= ( s16g_ApiIn_Pos15DegPopUp / 2 ) )
                              {

                              else

   728 14 5     *           s16t_AutoOpenSpeed = ( s16s_ComSpeed_Peak + ( ( s16g_ApiIn_Pos15DegPopUp / 2 ) * 10) ) - ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition * 15 );
                              }

   756 14 15    *       s32s_RefSpeed_Mon = ( S32 )s16t_AutoOpenSpeed; 
   758 14 16   (T)(F)   if( ( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > ( s16g_DoorCtrl_EOP - ( ( S16 )( 200 ) ) ) )
                          &&  ( (u8g_DoorPreCtrl_AntiPinchSts == ( ( U8 )( 0x03U ) ))

   767 14 19    *         s16s_PID_P_Err = s16s_PID_I_Err - s16s_PidErr1_Old;

                      static void s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoClose( void )
                      {
                          S16 s16t_CloseDisplacement;

                          S32 s32t_ChangePoint_2;    
   794 15 0    (T)    s_MotorSpdCtrl_AutoClose
   800 15 1     *       s32t_ChangePoint_1 = ( ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 - s32s_StartSpeed ) * s32s_AccelPos )                            + ( ( s32s_StartSpeed - s32s_TargetSpeed_1 ) * s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP ) ) / ( s32s_StartSpeed - s32s_TargetSpeed_1 ) );
   802 15 2     *       s32t_ChangePoint_2 = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 * ( ( S32 )s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP + s32s_AccelPos ) )                            + ( s32s_StartSpeed * ( s32s_AccelPos - ( S32 )s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP ) )                            - ( s32s_TargetSpeed_2 * s32s_DecelPos ) )
                                               / ( ( 2 * s32s_TargetSpeed_1 ) - s32s_TargetSpeed_2 - s32s_StartSpeed ) );                            
   806 15 3     *       s32s_ChangePoint1_Mon = s32t_ChangePoint_1;
   807 15 4     *       s32s_ChangePoint2_Mon = s32t_ChangePoint_2;
   809 15 5    (T)(F)   if( s32t_ChangePoint_2 >= s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP )
                          {
   811 15 6     *         s32t_ChangePoint_2 = s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP;
                          }
   814 15 7     *       s16t_CloseDisplacement = s16g_DoorCtrl_SOP - s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition;
   815 15 8    (T)(F)   if( s32t_ChangePoint_1 <= s32s_DecelPos )
                          {    
   817 15 9    (T)(F)     if( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > s32t_ChangePoint_2 )
                              {
   819 15 10    *           s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 - s32s_StartSpeed ) * ( S32 )s16t_CloseDisplacement ) / s32s_AccelPos ) + s32s_StartSpeed;  
   820 15 11   (T)(F)       if( ( s32t_AutoCloseSpeed > s32s_TargetSpeed_2 )
                                  &&  ( s32s_TargetSpeed_2 > s32s_TargetSpeed_1 ) )
                                  {

                                  }
                              }
                              else 
   826 15 13   (T)(F)       if( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition > s32s_LatchLockPos )
                              {
   828 15 14    *             s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 - s32s_TargetSpeed_2 ) * ( ( S32 )s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition - s32s_LatchLockPos )                                     / ( s32s_DecelPos - s32s_LatchLockPos ) ) + s32s_TargetSpeed_2 );
                              }
                              else
                              {
   833 15 15    *             s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_2 - s32s_TargetSpeed_3 ) * ( ( S32 )s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition / s32s_LatchLockPos ) )                                     + s32s_TargetSpeed_3 );
                              }
                          }
                          else
                          {    
   839 15 16   (T)(F)     if( s16t_CloseDisplacement <= s32s_AccelPos )
                              {
   841 15 17    *           s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 - s32s_StartSpeed ) * ( S32 )s16t_CloseDisplacement ) / s32s_AccelPos ) + s32s_StartSpeed;
   842 15 18   (T)(F)       if( s32t_AutoCloseSpeed > s32s_TargetSpeed_1 )
                                  {
   844 15 19    *             s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = s32s_TargetSpeed_1;
                                  }
                              }
                              else 
   847 15 20   (T)(F)       if( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition >= s32s_DecelPos )
                              {
   849 15 21    *             s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = s32s_TargetSpeed_1; 
                              }
                              else 
   851 15 22   (T)(F)         if( s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition >= s32s_LatchLockPos )
                              {
   853 15 23    *               s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_1 - s32s_TargetSpeed_2 ) * ( ( S32 )s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition - s32s_LatchLockPos )                                     / ( s32s_DecelPos - s32s_LatchLockPos ) ) + s32s_TargetSpeed_2 );                                  
                              }
                              else
                              {
   858 15 24    *               s32t_AutoCloseSpeed = ( ( ( s32s_TargetSpeed_2 - s32s_TargetSpeed_3 ) * ( ( S32 )s16g_ApiIn_MotorPosition / s32s_LatchLockPos ) )                                     + s32s_TargetSpeed_3 );
                              }
                          }
   863 15 25    *       s32s_RefSpeed_Mon = s32t_AutoCloseSpeed ; 
   865 15 26    *       s16s_PID_I_Err = ( ( S16 )s32t_AutoCloseSpeed - ( S16 )u16g_ApiIn_MotorSpeed ) / 16;
   866 15 27    *       s16s_PID_P_Err = s16s_PID_I_Err - s16s_PidErr1_Old;
   867 15 28    *       s16s_PID_D_Err = s16s_PidErr1_Old - s16s_PidErr2_Old;  
   869 15 29    *       s32s_ComSpeed += ( ( ( S32 )s16s_PID_P_Err / ( ( S8 )( 30 ) ) * ( ( S8 )( 5 ) ) )                      + ( ( S32 )s16s_PID_I_Err / ( ( S8 )( 10 ) ) * ( ( S8 )( 2 ) ) )                      + ( ( ( S32 )s16s_PID_P_Err - ( S32 )s16s_PID_D_Err ) / ( ( S8 )( 50 ) ) * ( ( S8 )( 3 ) ) ) );

   874 15 31    *       s16s_PidErr1_Old = s16s_PID_I_Err;

   878 15 33    *       return;

                      static S32 s32s_MotorSpdCtrl_CloseAstVsupRatioCalc( void )

  1153 21 1     *       S32 s32t_VsupRatio = 100;

                      static EEPROM_TAddress EEPROMaddr;      
                      static U16 BackupArray[0x02];          
                      static void BackupSector( const U16* Addr, U16 From, U16 To )
                      {
                          U16 i;
    33 1 0     (T)    BackupSector
    36 1 1     (T)(F)   for( i = From; i < To; i = i + 2U )
                          {
    38 1 2      *         BackupArray[ i / 2U ] = *( U16* ) ( Addr + ( i / 2U ) );     
                          }
    41 1 3      *       return;
                      }
                      static U8 WriteBlock( const U16* Addr, U16 From, U16 To, const U16* Data )
                      {
    54 2 0     (T)    WriteBlock
    55 2 1      *       U8 err = 0U;
                          U8 j;
                          U8 u8t_Temp;        
                          U16 i;

    61 2 2     (T)(F)   if( From == To )
                          {
    63 2 3      *         u8t_Temp = 0U;
                          }
                          else
                          {
    67 2 4      *         i = From;
    68 2 5      *         PhraseAddr = ( U32 )Addr;
    69 2 6     (T)(F)     while( i < To )
                              {
    72 2 7      *           REG_FSTAT . Byte = 0x30U;           
    73 2 8      *           REG_FCCOBIX . Byte = 5U;

    77 2 12    (T)(F)       for( j = 0U; j < 4U; j++ )
                                  {
    79 2 13     *             *( ( volatile U16* ) &REG_FCCOB2 . Word + j ) = *( ( const U16* )( Data + ( i / 2U ) ) );  
    80 2 14     *             i += 2U;
    81 2 15    (T)(F)         if( i >= To )
                                      {
    83 2 16     *               REG_FCCOBIX . Byte = j + 2U;            
    84 2 17     *               break;
                                      }
                                  }
    87 2 18     *           REG_FSTAT . Byte = 0x80U;                       
    88 2 19    ( )(F)       while( REG_FSTAT . Bits . CCIF == 0U ){
    88 2 20                   ;}

                                  {    
    91 2 22                   err = 9U;         
                                  }
                                  else

    95 2 23    ( )(F)         if( REG_FSTAT . MergedBits . grpMGSTAT != ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                                      {

                      static U8 EraseSectorInternal( const U16* Addr )
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Temp;
   126 3 0     (T)    EraseSectorInternal
   129 3 1     (T)(F)   if( REG_FSTAT . Bits . CCIF == 0U )
                          {

                          else

   136 3 3      *         REG_FSTAT . Byte = 0x30U;

                              {

                      U8 EEPROM_SetByte(EEPROM_TAddress Addr,U8 Data)
                      {
                          U8 err;
                          U8 u8t_Temp;    
                          U16 u16t_Data;
                          EEPROM_TAddress SecAddr;         
                          EEPROM_TAddress AddrIn;         
   184 4 0     (T)    EEPROM_SetByte
   191 4 1      *       AddrIn = Addr;    
   192 4 2     (T)(F)   if( AddrIn > ((EEPROM_TAddress)0x001003FFUL) )
                          {    
   194 4 3      *         u8t_Temp = 2U;        
                          }
                          else
                          {            
   198 4 4     (T)(F)     if( REG_FSTAT . Bits . CCIF != ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                              {    
   200 4 5      *           u8t_Temp = 8U;     
                              }
                              else
                              {
   204 4 6      *           SecAddr = ( EEPROM_TAddress )( ( U32 )AddrIn &0x00FFFFFCUL );      
   205 4 7      *           BackupSector( SecAddr, 0U, 0x04U );      
   206 4 8      *           u16t_Data = BackupArray[ ( ( ( U32 )AddrIn ) %0x04U ) / 2U ];         
   207 4 9     (T)(F)       if( ( ( ( U32 )AddrIn ) &1U ) == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                                  {    
   209 4 10     *             u16t_Data = (u16t_Data &0xFF00U) | Data;
                                  }
                                  else
                                  {
   213 4 11     *             u16t_Data = ( ( U16 )Data << 8U ) | ( u16t_Data &0xFFU );
                                  }
   215 4 12     *           BackupArray[ ( ( ( U32 )AddrIn ) %0x04U ) / 2U ] = u16t_Data;         
   216 4 13     *           err = EraseSectorInternal( AddrIn );       
   217 4 14    (T)(F)       if( err == 0U )
                                  {
   219 4 15     *             err = WriteBlock(SecAddr, 0U, 0x04U,BackupArray);        
                                  }
   221 4 16     *           u8t_Temp = err;
                              }
                          }
   225 4 17     *       return( u8t_Temp );       
                      }
                      U8 EEPROM_GetByte(EEPROM_TAddress Addr,U8 *Data)
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Temp;
   249 5 0     (T)    EEPROM_GetByte
   252 5 1     (T)(F)   if( Addr > ((EEPROM_TAddress)0x001003FFUL) )
                          {    
   254 5 2      *         u8t_Temp = 2U;        
                          }
                          else
                          {
   258 5 3     (T)(F)     if( REG_FSTAT . Bits . CCIF != ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                              {    
   260 5 4      *           u8t_Temp = 8U;     
                              }
                              else
                              {
   264 5 5      *           EEPROMaddr = Addr;       
   265 5 6      *           *Data = *((U8 *)Addr);
   266 5 7      *           u8t_Temp = 0U;       
                              }
                          }
   270 5 8      *       return( u8t_Temp );       
                      }
                      void EEPROM_Init(void)
                      {
   285 6 0     (T)    EEPROM_Init
   286 6 1      *       REG_FCLKDIV . Byte = 0x1DU;     
   287 6 2      *       EEPROMaddr = (EEPROM_TAddress)((U32)(((EEPROM_TAddress)0x00100000UL)) - 1U);  
   289 6 3      *       return;
                      }

                      static volatile U8 OutFlg;                                        
                      static volatile U16 ModeFlg;                                      
                      static volatile U16 ErrFlg;                                       
                      static void Monitor_ADC_MainMeasure(void);
                      U8 Monitor_ADC_Enable(void)
                      {
    57 1 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_Enable
    58 1 1     (T)(F)   if( MonitorAdc_EnUser != ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          {    
    60 1 2      *         MonitorAdc_EnUser = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );             
    61 1 3      *         Monitor_ADC_HWEnDi( );       
                          }
    64 1 4      *       return 0U;       
                      }
                      U8 Monitor_ADC_Disable(void)
                      {
    84 2 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_Disable
    85 2 1     (T)(F)   if( MonitorAdc_EnUser != ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                          {    
    87 2 2      *         MonitorAdc_EnUser = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );            
    88 2 3      *         Monitor_ADC_HWEnDi( );       
                          }
    91 2 4      *       return 0U;       
                      }
                      U8 Monitor_ADC_Measure(U8 WaitForResult)
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Temp;
   128 3 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_Measure
   131 3 1     (T)(F)   if( MonitorAdc_EnUser != ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          {    
   133 3 2      *         u8t_Temp = 7U;     
                          }
                          else
                          {
   137 3 3     (T)(F)     if( ModeFlg != 0x00U )
                              {    
   139 3 4      *           u8t_Temp = 8U;     
                              }
                              else
                              {
   143 3 5      *           ModeFlg = 0x02U;           
   144 3 6      *           Monitor_ADC_HWEnDi( );       
   145 3 7     (T)(F)       if( WaitForResult != ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ) )
                                  {    
   147 3 8     (T)( )         while( ModeFlg != 0x00U )
                                      {    
   149 3 9      *               Monitor_ADC_MainMeasure( );      
                                      }
                                  }
   152 3 10     *           u8t_Temp = 0U;       
                              }
                          }
   156 3 11     *       return( u8t_Temp );
                      }
                      U8 Monitor_ADC_GetValue16(U16 u16t_AdcBuffer[8])
                      {
                          U8 u8t_Index;
                          U8 u8t_Temp;
   188 4 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_GetValue16
   192 4 1     (T)(F)   if( ModeFlg != 0x00U )
                          {    
   194 4 2      *         Monitor_ADC_MainMeasure( );
                          }
   197 4 3     (T)(F)   if( OutFlg != ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          {    
   199 4 4      *         u8t_Temp = 9U;     
                          }
                          else
                          {
   203 4 5     (T)(F)     for( u8t_Index = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_Index < 8U; u8t_Index++ )
                              {
   205 4 6      *           u16t_AdcBuffer[ u8t_Index ] = ( U16 )( RVL[ u8t_Index ] << 0x06U );  
                              }
   208 4 7      *         u8t_Temp = 0U;       
                          }
   211 4 8      *       return( u8t_Temp );
                      }
                      void Monitor_ADC_HWEnDi(void)
                      {
   226 5 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_HWEnDi
   227 5 1     (T)(F)   if( MonitorAdc_EnUser == ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) ) )
                          {    
   229 5 2     ( )(F)     if( ModeFlg != 0x00U )
                              {    
   231 5 3                  OutFlg = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );              
   232 5 4     ( )( )       if( ( REG_ADC0CTL . Word &0x8000U ) == 0U )
                                  {
   234 5 5                    REG_ADC0CTL . Word |= ~0x8000U;      
                                  }
   236 5 6     ( )( )       while( ( REG_ADC0STS . Byte &0x08U ) == 0x00U ){ }  
   237 5 7                  REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte = 0x20U;        
   238 5 8     ( )( )       while( REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte != 0x00U ){ }          
   239 5 9                  REG_ADC0FLWCTL . Byte = 0x40U;        
                              }
                              else
                              {
   243 5 10    (T)(F)       if( ( REG_ADC0CTL . Word &0x8000U ) == 0U )
                                  {
   245 5 11     *             REG_ADC0CTL . Word |= ~0x8000U;   
                                  }
                              }
                          }
                          else
                          {
   251 5 12     *         REG_ADC0CTL . Word &= ~0x8000U;      
                          }
   254 5 13     *       return;
                      }
                      static void Monitor_ADC_MainMeasure(void)
                      {
                          U16 tempErrFlg;                  
   269 6 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_MainMeasure
   272 6 1     (T)(F)   if( ( REG_ADC0CONIF . Word &0x01U ) != 0x00U )
                          {    
   274 6 2      *         REG_ADC0CONIF . Word = 0x01U;            
   275 6 3      *         OutFlg = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );               
   276 6 4      *         ModeFlg = 0x00U;          
                          }
   279 6 5      *       tempErrFlg = (U16)( ( U16 )REG_ADC0EIF . Byte << 8U );
   280 6 6      *       tempErrFlg |= (U16)( REG_ADC0IF . Byte );
   281 6 7      *       tempErrFlg &= 0xFE40U;
   282 6 8      *       ErrFlg = tempErrFlg;
   284 6 9     (T)(F)   if( ( ErrFlg &0xF800U ) != 0U )
                          {
   286 6 10     *         ModeFlg = 0x00U;
   287 6 11     *         REG_ADC0CTL . Word |= ~0x4000U;          
                          }
                          else 
   289 6 12    (T)(F)     if( ( ErrFlg &0xFE40U ) != 0U )
                          {
   291 6 13     *           REG_ADC0EIF . Byte = 0x06U;              
   292 6 14     *           REG_ADC0IF . Byte = 0x40U;               
                          }
                          else
                          {
   296 6 15     *           ;    
                          }
   299 6 16    (T)(F)   if( ( REG_ADC0IF . Byte & 0x80U ) != 0U )
                          {
   301 6 17     *         REG_ADC0IF . Byte = 0x80U;               
   302 6 18     *         ModeFlg = 0x00U;
                          }
   305 6 19     *       return;
                      }
                      void Monitor_ADC_Init(void)
                      {
   320 7 0     (T)    Monitor_ADC_Init
   321 7 1      *       MonitorAdc_EnUser = ( ( U8 )( 0x01U ) );             
   322 7 2      *       OutFlg = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) );            
   323 7 3      *       ModeFlg = 0x00U;          
   324 7 4      *       REG_ADC0CTL . Word = 0x00U;              
   325 7 5      *       ADC0CBP = CSL;
   326 7 6      *       ADC0RBP = RVL;
   327 7 7      *       REG_ADC0FMT . Byte = 0x82U;              
   328 7 8      *       REG_ADC0TIM . Byte = 0x12U;              
   329 7 9      *       REG_ADC0CROFF1 . Byte = 0x00U;           
   330 7 10     *       REG_ADC0EIF . Byte = 0x06U;              
   331 7 11     *       REG_ADC0EIE . Byte = 0x00U;              
   332 7 12     *       REG_ADC0IF . Byte = 0xC0U;               
   333 7 13     *       REG_ADC0IE . Byte = 0x00U;               
   334 7 14     *       REG_ADC0CONIF . Word = 0x01U;            
   335 7 15     *       REG_ADC0CONIE . Word = 0x00U;            
   336 7 16     *       REG_ADC0CTL . Word = 0x8800U;           
   338 7 17     *       return;
                      }

                      {

                          {

                          else

                          }    
   152 1 4      *       return( u16t_Temp );
                      }
                      void g_UDS_RDBI_Paser( void )
                      {
   162 2 0     (T)    g_UDS_RDBI_Paser
   163 2 1      *       u8s_UdsSid = lin_tl_rx_queue.tl_pdu[lin_tl_rx_queue.queue_header][2];
   164 2 2      *       u8s_DidMsb = lin_tl_rx_queue.tl_pdu[lin_tl_rx_queue.queue_header][3];
   165 2 3      *       u8s_DidLsb = lin_tl_rx_queue.tl_pdu[lin_tl_rx_queue.queue_header][4];
   166 2 4      *       u8s_SwIntVer = lin_tl_rx_queue.tl_pdu[lin_tl_rx_queue.queue_header][5];
   168 2 5     (T)(F)   if( ( u8s_DidMsb == ( ( U8 )( 0xF1U ) ) )
                          ||  ( u8s_DidMsb == ( ( U8 )( 0xC2U ) ) ) )
                          {
   171 2 6      *         switch( u8s_DidLsb )
                              {
   173 2 7     (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA2U ) ):
   174 2 8      *             s_UDS_RDBI_ProdDate( );
   175 2 9      *             break;
   176 2 10    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA3U ) ):
   177 2 11     *             s_UDS_RDBI_PartNumber( ); 
   178 2 12     *             break;
   179 2 13    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA4U ) ):
   180 2 14     *             s_UDS_RDBI_SW_Version( );

   602 11 8    (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0x12U ) ):

   605 11 11   (T)          case ( ( U8 )( 0xA0U ) ):
   606 11 12    *             s_UDS_WDBI_UsOptMain( );
   607 11 13    *             break;

   617 11 18    *       return;

                      void s_UDS_WDBI_UsOpt_F1G( void )

   729 15 5    (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0xB2U ) ):

   735 15 11   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0xB4U ) ):

   764 16 11   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0xB8U ) ):

   766 16 13    *           break;
   767 16 14   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0xB9U ) ):

   770 16 17   (T)        case ( ( U8 )( 0xBAU ) ):

   773 16 20   (T)        default:

                      void s_UDS_WDBI_ProdDate( void )
                      {	 
                          U8 u8t_EepromAddrIdx;
                          U8 u8t_FrameCnt;
                          U8 u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx;

   791 17 1     *       U16 u16t_Length = 0x05U;
   793 17 2    (T)(F)   for( u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx = ( ( U8 )( 0x00U ) ); u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx < ( ( U8 )( 0x04U ) ); u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx++ )
                          {
   795 17 3     *         u8t_FrameCnt = 1U;
   796 17 4     *         u8g_SysUds_WriteData[u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx] = lin_tl_rx_queue.tl_pdu[u8t_FrameCnt][u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx + 2U];
                          }
   799 17 5     *       u8g_SysUds_WdbiCmd = ( ( U8 )( 0xA2U ) );
   802 17 6     *       u8s_DataBuffer[0] = ( u8s_UdsSid | ( ( U8 )( 0x40U ) ) );
   803 17 7     *       u8s_DataBuffer[1] = u8s_DidMsb;
   804 17 8     *       u8s_DataBuffer[2] = u8s_DidLsb;
   805 17 9     *       u8s_DataBuffer[3] = u8s_UserServiceIdMsb;
   806 17 10    *       u8s_DataBuffer[4] = u8s_UserServiceIdLsb;    
   808 17 11    *       ld_send_message( u16t_Length, u8s_DataBuffer );
   810 17 12    *       return;
                      }
                      void s_UDS_WDBI_PartNumber( void )
                      {	 
                          U8 u8t_EepromAddrIdx;
                          U8 u8t_FrameCnt;
                          U8 u8t_LinRxDatabuffIdx;
